summary: Petty Cash Multi-Level Approval feature testing completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for SE Dashboard (Petty Cash tab with summary cards, sub-tabs), PM Dashboard (Petty Cash tab with approve/reject), and Accountant PettyCashManagement (accessed via expense category card).
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests (petty cash requests, direct expenses, custom categories)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Petty Cash Multi-Level Approval flow fully tested. Backend APIs: POST /api/site-engineer/petty-cash/request, GET /api/pm/petty-cash-requests, PATCH /api/pm/petty-cash/{id}/approve, PATCH /api/pm/petty-cash/{id}/reject, PATCH /api/accountant/petty-cash/{id}/process-payment, PATCH /api/site-engineer/petty-cash/{id}/acknowledge, GET /api/site-engineer/petty-cash/summary, GET /api/expense-categories, POST /api/expense-categories, POST /api/site-engineer/direct-expense, GET /api/site-engineer/direct-expenses, GET /api/site-engineer/petty-cash/income-history. Frontend: SE Dashboard has Petty Cash tab with summary cards and 3 sub-tabs. PM Dashboard has Petty Cash tab with table. Accountant accesses PettyCashManagement via clicking 'Petty Cash' expense category card in Accounts Board.

backend_apis.se_get_petty_cash_list: PASS - Returns SE's petty cash requests
backend_apis.se_get_petty_cash_summary: PASS - Returns summary (cash_in_hand, expenses, pending, waiting)
backend_apis.pm_get_petty_cash_requests: PASS - Returns requests for PM approval
backend_apis.accountant_process_payment: PASS - Processes payment with bank details, status 'payment_done'
backend_apis.record_direct_expense: PASS - Records expense with multiple line items
backend_apis.get_direct_expenses: PASS - Returns expense history with filters

se_dashboard_petty_cash_tab.summary_cards: PASS - Cash in Hand, Expenses, Pending Req, Waiting Approval
se_dashboard_petty_cash_tab.sub_tabs: PASS - Payment Req Status, Income History, Expense Record
se_dashboard_petty_cash_tab.request_status_timeline: PASS - Shows Requested → PM Approved → Accountant → Acknowledged

accountant_petty_cash_management.summary_cards: PASS - Total Issued, Total Spent, Total Balance, Pending Requests
accountant_petty_cash_management.pm_approved_pending_table: PASS - data-testid='acc-pc-pending-table' (shown when pending requests exist)
